items.title: Architectural Building
items.short_body: Community centres, schools, arenas, and public buildings. Turnkey general contracting in steel, wood, and masonry, including Behlen pre-engineered steel buildings.
items.long_body: Community centres, schools, arenas, and public buildings, delivered turnkey as general contractor. Steel, wood, and masonry construction, including Behlen pre-engineered steel buildings, with our own civil and electrical forces. From schools to recreation facilities across the province, we build the buildings communities live in.
items.thumb_alt: Timber lookout structure at Seven Corners
items.alt: Seven Corners timber lookout over Bonne Bay

items.title: Heavy Civil & Earthworks
items.short_body: Bulk excavation, roads, site development, and structural fills. If dirt or rock needs moving, we move it. Any quantity, anywhere.
items.long_body: Bulk excavation, roads, site development, structural fills, and underground services. Our machines cut directly to the 3D design surface on GPS control, and our as-builts verify against the survey record. If dirt or rock needs moving, we move it. Any quantity, anywhere.
items.thumb_alt: John Deere 350P excavator in the Pittmans fleet
items.alt: Pittmans crew installing underground services with GPS-equipped excavator

items.title: Marine Infrastructure
items.short_body: Wharves, dredging, and marine structures, with a specialty in breakwaters and coastal protection.
items.long_body: Wharves, dredging, and marine concrete, with a specialty in armour stone breakwaters and coastal protection. Hydrographic survey by our own autonomous vessel, subsea inspection by ROV, and structures laid out to survey control. Working harbours are where this company grew up.
items.thumb_alt: Long reach excavator on coastal marine works
items.alt: Long reach excavator on coastal marine works at sunset

items.title: Electrical
items.short_body: Licensed commercial and industrial electrical contracting in-house: services, distribution, and building systems.
items.long_body: Licensed commercial and industrial electrical contracting, in-house: services, distribution, and building systems. The same contractor that builds your site energizes it. One schedule, one warranty, one phone call.

items.title: Blasting & Crushing
items.short_body: We drill, blast, crush and deliver aggregates to keep your projects on time and on track.
items.long_body: Licensed drilling and blasting with mobile crushing and screening. We drill, blast, crush and deliver aggregates to keep your projects on time and on track. Spec material off our own crushers means schedule certainty no supplier price list can offer.
items.thumb_alt: Crushed rock pad produced by Pittmans
items.alt: Crushed rock pad produced and placed by Pittmans

items.title: Mining & Remote Sites
items.short_body: Camps, pads, and access development wherever the client needs us. If you can point to it on a map, we can build on it.
items.long_body: Camps, pads, and access development wherever the client needs us, executed on compressed timelines with our own fleet, including company float capacity to 75 tonnes. If you can point to it on a map, we can build on it.
items.thumb_alt: Remote exploration camp on crushed pad
items.alt: Remote exploration camp and pad in coastal Labrador
